title: Driving mode requires no route editing inside a decision zone
purpose: Make route editing unavailable and avoid requiring phone touch while the vehicle is moving through a branch decision.

limitations: Vehicle-motion and decision-zone state are synthetic inputs, not an automotive integration test.

guidance.japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

ja-JP.display_text: 左側を進み、B 湾岸線・横浜方面へ
ja-JP.spoken_text: 左側を進み、B 湾岸線、横浜方面へ
ja-JP.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

zh-Hans.display_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线・横滨方向
zh-Hans.spoken_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线，横滨方向
zh-Hans.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

en.display_text: Keep left for Route B toward Yokohama
en.spoken_text: Keep left for Route B toward Yokohama
en.preserved_japanese_sign_text: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.route_editing_availability
then.rationale: The route is configured before driving, not while choosing a JCT branch.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.carplay.route_editing_availability
then.rationale: The vehicle display cannot expose a different editing policy.

then.subject: presentation.kernel.phone.requires_phone_touch_while_moving
then.rationale: The current guidance must remain executable without touching the phone.
